 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-a11g","title":"E2E Tests: Dark Mode & Theme Switching","description":"## Origin
Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-0qd. Keep both repos in sync.

## Task
Create E2E tests for dark mode and theme switching functionality.

## Test Scenarios

### Theme Detection
1. Follows system preference by default
2. Light mode renders correctly
3. Dark mode renders correctly
4. No flash on page load

### Manual Toggle
5. Toggle switch visible
6. Click switches theme
7. Preference persists after refresh
8. Works in logged-out state

### Visual Consistency
9. All components styled for dark mode
10. Images/icons adapt appropriately
11. Charts/graphs readable in both
12. No white flashes during navigation

### Edge Cases
13. System preference changes honored
14. Override persists over system
15. Reset to system option works

## Files to Create
- e2e/theme/dark-mode.spec.ts
- e2e/theme/toggle.spec.ts
- e2e/lib/theme-helpers.ts

## Success Criteria
- No visual regressions in either mode
- Smooth theme transitions
- Preference correctly persisted

-{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-a12t","title":"E2E Tests: Accessibility (WCAG, Screen Readers, Keyboard Navigation)","description":"## Origin
Mirror from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-pld. Keep both repos in sync.

## Task
Create comprehensive E2E tests for accessibility compliance.

## Test Scenarios

### Keyboard Navigation
1. Tab order is logical
2. Focus visible on all interactive elements
3. Skip to content link works
4. Modal focus trap works
5. Escape closes modals/dropdowns
6. Arrow keys navigate menus

### Screen Reader
7. All images have alt text
8. Form labels associated correctly
9. ARIA landmarks present
10. Live regions announce changes
11. Error messages announced
12. Loading states announced

### Visual Accessibility
13. Color contrast meets WCAG AA
14. Focus indicators visible
15. Text resizable to 200%
16. No horizontal scroll at 320px
17. Touch targets 44x44px minimum

### Semantic HTML
18. Headings in logical order
19. Lists used appropriately
20. Tables have headers
21. Links vs buttons correct

### Interactive Elements
22. Buttons have accessible names
23. Links describe destination
24. Form validation accessible
25. Tooltips keyboard accessible

## Tools
- Playwright + axe-core for automated checks
- Manual testing with VoiceOver/NVDA

## Files to Create
- e2e/accessibility/keyboard.spec.ts
- e2e/accessibility/screen-reader.spec.ts
- e2e/accessibility/visual.spec.ts
- e2e/lib/a11y-helpers.ts

## Success Criteria
- Zero axe-core violations
- Keyboard-only navigation complete
- Screen reader tested on key flows

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-p9c1","title":"Implement user suspension and ban workflow","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-0798.

## Task
Implement structured workflow for user suspensions and bans.

## Why This Matters
- Handle violations consistently
- Progressive discipline
- Document actions
- Enable reinstatement

## Discipline Levels

### 1. Warning
- First offense for minor issues
- No access restriction
- Logged in history
- Educational message

### 2. Temporary Suspension (1-30 days)
- Moderate violations
- Cannot access account
- Content hidden
- Auto-reinstates

### 3. Indefinite Suspension
- Serious violations
- Manual review required
- Appeal possible
- Content preserved

### 4. Permanent Ban
- Severe/repeat violations
- Account deleted
- Content removed
- IP tracked (optional)

## Implementation

### Moderation Actions Table
```typescript
export const moderationActions = pgTable('moderation_actions', {
  id: uuid('id').primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
  
  // Target
  userId: uuid('user_id').references(() => userProfiles.id).notNull(),
  contentId: uuid('content_id'), // If content-specific
  contentType: text('content_type'),
  
  // Action
  actionType: text('action_type').notNull(), // warning, suspension, ban
  severity: integer('severity').notNull(), // 1-4
  reason: text('reason').notNull(),
  internalNotes: text('internal_notes'),
  
  // Duration (for suspensions)
  startsAt: timestamp('starts_at').defaultNow(),
  endsAt: timestamp('ends_at'),
  
  // Tracking
  performedBy: uuid('performed_by').references(() => userProfiles.id).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at').defaultNow(),
  
  // Reversal
  reversedAt: timestamp('reversed_at'),
  reversedBy: uuid('reversed_by'),
  reversalReason: text('reversal_reason'),
});
```

### User Status Check
```typescript
async function checkUserStatus(userId: string): Promise<UserStatus> {
  const activeActions = await db.select()
    .from(moderationActions)
    .where(and(
      eq(moderationActions.userId, userId),
      isNull(moderationActions.reversedAt),
      or(
        isNull(moderationActions.endsAt),
        gt(moderationActions.endsAt, new Date())
      )
    ))
    .orderBy(desc(moderationActions.severity));
  
  if (activeActions.length === 0) return { status: 'active' };
  
  const mostSevere = activeActions[0];
  return {
    status: mostSevere.actionType,
    reason: mostSevere.reason,
    endsAt: mostSevere.endsAt,
  };
}
```

### Enforcement
- Check status on login
- Block suspended users
- Show suspension message
- Redirect to appeal page

## Admin UI
- User lookup with history
- Take action button
- History timeline
- Reinstate option

## Notifications
- Email when action taken
- Appeal instructions included
- Reinstatement notification

## Files to Create
- src/lib/db/schema/moderation.ts
- src/lib/moderation/enforcement.ts
- src/app/(auth)/suspended/page.tsx
- src/app/(app)/admin/users/[id]/moderate/page.tsx

## Success Criteria
- Actions applied correctly
- Enforcement prevents access
- History tracked
- Reinstatement works

 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-pvs","title":"Implement web app unit tests (apps/web/__tests__)","description":"**Details:**
- Test React components render correctly
- Test hooks (useLocalStorage, useBasket)
- Test search integration
- Test copy-to-clipboard functionality
- Test keyboard navigation in SpotlightSearch

**Component Tests:**
- PromptCard: renders all fields, handles expansion, copy works
- PromptGrid: responsive layout, basket integration
- SpotlightSearch: keyboard nav, search debounce, selection
- BasketSidebar: add/remove, export buttons, persistence
- CategoryFilter/TagFilter: selection state, URL sync

**Hook Tests:**
- useLocalStorage: persistence, hydration
- useBasket: add/remove/clear, context propagation

**Framework:** Vitest + @testing-library/react + happy-dom

**Test Organization:**
```
apps/web/__tests__/
  components/
    prompt-card.test.tsx
    spotlight-search.test.tsx
    basket-sidebar.test.tsx
  hooks/
    use-local-storage.test.ts
    use-basket.test.ts
  lib/
    search-engine.test.ts
```

**Reasoning:** Component tests catch UI regressions. Hook tests ensure state management works. Critical for maintaining UX quality across changes.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:31.273796804-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:12:59.883387661-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:12:59.883387661-05:00","close_reason":"Added unit tests for useLocalStorage hook (15 tests), BasketContext (13 tests), and PromptCard component (22 tests). All 364 tests pass. Tests cover initialization, setValue, removeValue, cross-tab sync, error handling, basket add/remove/clear, component rendering, difficulty indicators, featured badges, and click handlers.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-pvs","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r9m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:08.603663868-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-pw2j","title":"E2E Tests: Referral Program","description":"## Origin
Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-2ao2.

## Task
Create E2E tests for referral program functionality.

## Test Scenarios

### Referral Code
1. User has referral code
2. Code is unique
3. Copy code works
4. Share links work

### Referral Flow
5. Referee uses referral link
6. Referral tracked on signup
7. Extended trial granted
8. Referral shows as pending

### Conversion
9. Referee converts to paid
10. Referral marked as converted
11. Referrer gets reward
12. Both notified

### Edge Cases
13. Self-referral prevented
14. Expired codes handled
15. Duplicate referral prevented
16. Code case-insensitive

## Files to Create
- e2e/referral/code.spec.ts
- e2e/referral/flow.spec.ts
- e2e/referral/rewards.spec.ts
- e2e/lib/referral-helpers.ts

## Success Criteria
- Full referral flow tested
- Rewards applied correctly
- Fraud prevented
